BOARDINTAKEPRIORITIZESPECBACKLOGCAPACITYREPORTINGMETRICSPORTFOLIODOCSGOVERNANCEASSISTANTDIALSAUDIT
METHODOLOGY v1.0·CHAIN VERIFIED

LOOPER ASSISTANT

Cite-or-refuse across LOOPER content and Product Context. Every claim carries a source receipt — or it says it doesn't have one. No bluffing. No LLM in the answer path.

TAMPER-EVIDENT DECISION CHAIN · Every line on this surface is regenerated from the system of record and cites a ledger receipt — it cannot go stale, and it cannot be quietly rewritten. SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA; NO CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. Deterministic · zero-LLM in the decision path · local-first.
